CustomField.description: End date of the original Insurance policy being renewed. Derived from the Renewal Opportunity's Original Insurance (Original_Insurance__r.Insurance_End_Date__c). Shown under the "Expiration Date" label on the Quote record page.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Read-only — the original policy's end date, pulled from the Renewal's Original Insurance.
CustomField.label: Expiration Date
